creator: thefloridaqueenie
caption:
Looking for things to do around Florida? Comment "Guide" and I'll send you my interactive Florida map and guide with over 1,000 spots to explore! I did the work for you so you can just hit the road without hours of research and stress!
I’ve lived in Florida my whole life and I’m still amazed by it’s beauty. These videos were taken at the Ringling museum in Sarasota and I felt like I stepped into Europe. Have you been? #visitsarasota #visitfl #thingstodoinflorida #thingstodoinsarasota #florida #sarasota #floridalife #travelgram
